description: Evaluation assets for Light Interaction. The selected initial images are derived from the official VBench-I2V Image Suite.
redistribution: This repository does not redistribute VBench-I2V image assets. Use evaluation/scripts/download_eval_assets.py to download the official VBench-I2V assets and extract the selected 200 images.
